The Show Must Go On... Whether You Like It Or Not.

Step into the world of the Freak Circus, a traveling troupe that feels less like a show and more like a fever dream. You play as a regular person who makes the mistake of being kind to a monster.

After defending Pierrot—a towering, 6'6" mute clown with a permanent, razor-toothed grin—from a hostile crowd, his gratitude quickly spirals into a terrifying, soul-consuming obsession. He doesn’t just want your thanks; he wants your everything.

The game is a psychological horror visual novel where the line between "protection" and "possession" is blurred. As you delve deeper into the circus, you’ll realize the performers aren't humans in costumes—they are "Monsters" hiding from a dark past , bound together by a cult-like family bond and a shared hunger for blood.
